steps.title: Identify what the sentence adds
steps.content:
The first sentence praises Jones as a talented writer. The underlined sentence shifts focus: it connects a specific content choice (Blackfeet characters) to a broader cultural impact.

The key phrase—about ensuring Indigenous people have a place in the horror genre—emphasizes the significance of the representation itself.

steps.title: Connect the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Because the sentence highlights how the novel's portrayal of Indigenous people matters culturally—it opened representational space in the genre—the answer must capture that significance.

Choice C does exactly this. The other choices don't fit:
  • A predicts future author behavior the text never suggests
  • B challenges an autobiographical claim the sentence doesn't make
  • D poses a question the passage never asks
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
